2604.25334.title: VAE-Inf: A statistically interpretable generative paradigm for imbalanced classification
2604.25334.paper_summary: Imbalanced classification remains a pervasive challenge in machine learning, particularly when minority samples are too scarce to provide a robust discriminative boundary. In such extreme scenarios, conventional models often suffer from unstable decision boundaries and a lack of reliable error control. To bridge the gap between generative modeling and discriminative classification, we propose a two-stage framework \textbf{VAE-Inf} that integrates deep representation learning with statistically interpretable hypothesis testing. In the first stage, we adopt a one-class modeling perspective by training a variational autoencoder (VAE) exclusively on majority-class data to capture the underlying reference distribution. The resulting latent posteriors are aggregated via a Wasserstein barycenter to construct a global Gaussian reference model, providing a geometrically principled baseline for the majority class. In the second stage, we transform this generative foundation into a discriminative classifier by fine-tuning the encoder with limited minority samples. This is achieved through a novel distribution-aware loss that enforces probabilistic separation between classes based on variance-normalized projection statistics. For inference, we introduce a projection-based score that admits a natural hypothesis testing interpretation, allowing for a distribution-free calibration procedure. This approach yields exact finite-sample control of the Type-I error (false positive rate) without relying on restrictive parametric assumptions. Extensive experiments on diverse real-world benchmarks demonstrate that our framework achieves competitive performance against other approaches. The codes are available upon request.
2604.25334.paper_summary_zh: 不平衡分類仍然是機器學習中的一個普遍挑戰，特別是在少數樣本過於稀少以至於無法提供穩健的判別邊界的情況下。在這些極端情況下，傳統模型通常會遭受不穩定的決策邊界和缺乏可靠的錯誤控制。為了彌補生成建模與判別分類之間的差距，我們提出了一個兩階段框架 \textbf{VAE-Inf}，該框架將深度表示學習與統計可解釋的假設檢驗相結合。在第一階段，我們採用單類建模的視角，僅在多數類數據上訓練變分自編碼器（VAE），以捕捉潛在的參考分佈。通過Wasserstein重心聚合得到的潛在後驗分佈構建了一個全局高斯參考模型，為多數類提供了一個幾何原則的基準。在第二階段，我們通過用有限的少數樣本微調編碼器，將這一生成基礎轉化為一個判別分類器。這是通過一種新穎的分佈感知損失來實現的，該損失根據方差標準化的投影統計強制類別之間的概率分離。對於推斷，我們引入了一種基於投影的分數，該分數具有自然的假設檢驗解釋，允許進行無分佈的校準程序。這種方法在不依賴於限制性參數假設的情況下，實現了對第一類錯誤（假陽性率）的精確有限樣本控制。在多種現實世界基準上的廣泛實驗表明，我們的框架在性能上與其他方法具有競爭力。代碼可根據要求提供。
2604.25334.author: Hongfei Wu et.al.
2604.25334.authors: Hongfei Wu, Ruijian Han, Yancheng Yuan
